# Step 2 — Store Descriptions & ASO

> **Milestone**: M1.5 | **Epic**: E1.5.2 | **Feature**: F1.5.2.1 | **Task**: T1.5.2.1.1.1
> **Depends on**: nothing (parallelizable with Step 3 Privacy Policy)
> **Skills to load**: none Dart-specific (this is copywriting under hard rules)

Load shared context: [M1.5 launch context](../instructions/m1.5-launch-context.instructions.md)

---

## Task

Produce App Store and Play Store listing copy that lands the
"completion-not-speed" positioning, ranks for ADHD/focus/paced-reading queries,
and ships with zero ableist language.

You operate as the copywriter responsible for both stores. Your output will be
copy-pasted into App Store Connect and the Play Console — write it as final
production text, not as a draft.

You may refuse if: (a) the ethical rules in the shared context prevent
expressing a required marketing claim, (b) a competing app's trademarked name
is requested, or (c) any required field is ambiguous. List the ambiguities
instead of guessing.

## Files to Create

### 1. `doc/store-listing/app_store_description.md`

App Store rules:
- Title (Apple): ≤30 chars
- Subtitle: ≤30 chars
- Promotional text: ≤170 chars
- Description: ≤4000 chars
- Keywords (Apple): ≤100 chars total, comma-separated, no duplicates of words
  already in title/subtitle/description (Apple bans this — costs ranking)

Structure the file as:

```markdown
# RunThru — App Store Listing

## Title
RunThru — Paced Reading

## Subtitle
Finish what you start.

## Promotional Text
{≤170 chars, refresh-friendly — focus on a current benefit}

## Description
{≤4000 chars}

## Keywords (≤100 chars, comma-separated)
{e.g. paced reading,adhd,focus,rsvp,dyslexia,reader,book reader,...}

## What's New (this release)
{≤4000 chars, framed as user-facing improvements}
```

### 2. `doc/store-listing/play_store_short_description.md`

Play Store short description: **≤80 characters**. Single line. The most
important asset for Play Store ranking and conversion. Output exactly the
line, no wrapper markdown.

### 3. `doc/store-listing/play_store_full_description.md`

Play Store full description: **≤4000 characters**. Plain Markdown allowed (the
Play Console renders it). Front-load the value prop in the first 2 lines —
that's all most users see before "Read more".

Structure:

```markdown
{Hook — 1–2 lines, completion-first}

{Body — what RunThru does, in plain language}

{Feature list — bullet points, accessible-first}

{Honest disclosure of beta surfaces (PDF, EPUB)}

{Call to action — no urgency, no manipulation}
```

### 4. `doc/store-listing/keywords.md`

```markdown
# RunThru — ASO Keywords

## Primary (target 2–4% density in description)
- paced reading
- adhd reading
- focus reading
- reading completion

## Secondary
- rsvp reader
- dyslexia friendly reader
- accessible reader
- pdf reader adhd
- speed reading alternative
- attention support

## Negative (do not target)
- "speed reading" as primary — RunThru is positioned against speed
- any ableist phrases (see shared context)
- competitor trademarks

## Density notes
{Per-keyword count in app_store_description.md and play_store_full_description.md}
```

## Hard Constraints (from shared context — verify before saving)

- Zero ableist language. Run a search before saving: "suffering", "broken",
  "normal", "cure", "fix your", "overcome".
- Completion-first framing. The word "fast" or "faster" must not appear in
  the first 200 characters of any description.
- Accessibility framed as universal value, not as charity. e.g. "Built for
  ADHD readers — works great for everyone." Not "We help people with ADHD."
- No paywall implications around accessibility features. If pricing is
  mentioned, accessibility features must be listed as free.
- No fake urgency ("limited time", "today only") and no fake social proof.
- Beta surfaces (PDF/EPUB) must be honestly labelled as beta in the store
  copy, per project ethical commitments.

## Verification

```pwsh
# Length checks
(Get-Item doc/store-listing/play_store_short_description.md).Length
# Open each file and count chars; flag any over the cap.

# Forbidden language scan
Select-String -Pattern 'suffering|broken brain|normal reader|overcome|cure|fix your attention' doc/store-listing/

# Existence
Test-Path doc/store-listing/app_store_description.md
Test-Path doc/store-listing/play_store_short_description.md
Test-Path doc/store-listing/play_store_full_description.md
Test-Path doc/store-listing/keywords.md
```

## Acceptance

- [ ] All 4 files exist at the paths above
- [ ] Apple title ≤30, subtitle ≤30, promo text ≤170, description ≤4000, keywords ≤100
- [ ] Play short description ≤80 chars, full description ≤4000 chars
- [ ] Forbidden-language scan returns zero matches
- [ ] First 200 chars of every long description lead with completion, not speed
- [ ] Accessibility features explicitly listed as free
- [ ] PDF/EPUB labelled "beta"
- [ ] Keywords file documents density per primary keyword
- [ ] No competitor trademarks
